event: The First Ecumenical Council of Nicaea
symbols: orator with raised hand — the defense of orthodox doctrine against heresy
emperor on throne — the intersection of imperial and ecclesiastical authority
gathered bishops — the universal Church deliberating on the nature of Christ
arched interior — the sacred space of conciliar deliberation
description: An interior scene under stone arches showing a Church council in session. At center-left, a bearded cleric in white and gold vestments stands with his right hand raised in an oratorical gesture, addressing the assembly. At right, a figure in imperial robes and crown (Constantine) sits elevated on a throne. Around them, rows of bishops and clergy in varied ecclesiastical vestments — white, gold, dark — sit and stand, some holding books, listening intently. The architectural setting features Romanesque arches and columns. The palette is warm with golds, whites, and deep reds.
